Okay, mega important question. Is gacha operated by pseudorandom or true random? E.g., unsuccessful pulls somehow increases future probabilities or not? And if yes, are luminous and pure cores separated?
if it were pseudorandom then it would be a well hidden secret
Ik but I wonder if community had done any serious research in this direction
how would research for that even look like?
gacha is rigged when I don't get 2 SSR in 5 pulls and normal when I do
gacha is rigged when I get off banner and normal when I hit banner twice
A lot of aggregated data with pull results from different accounts
this will just go into seeded acc conspiracies
how would you interpret that data, all it would take is one weird point to throw the whole thing out of whack
and then there's the "seasonals vs sweats" conspiracy
the answer is always "gacha was rigged against me" though
and what juice said if you did find good points who’s to say it was either bias from the researcher or the devs themselves
only sane take
we barely have enough players to not go eos 😔
they shouldn't be rigging the gacha against me then
I put in 100 pulls, why am I still in jail?
simply whale harder
couldve gotten 3 casiahs like me

Well, I have no idea how I'd interpret the data before I see it, but I suspect if it's pseudo-random it'll follow the rule "there are character at least once in the X pulls". Basically, it's just standard scientific loop of making hypothesis, doing SQL request (or other kind of experiment), and promote to theory if true
just remember, games already implode if people find out the rates are off
but if the gacha itself is rigged? <:Corpo_advance:1459080545882341376>
also you're basically just describing the pity systems that have become common throughout gachas ever since monkey gate

Hello, I started playing the game recently and saw a dev write out a really heartfelt message about the game not dying on twitter recently. I normally am an anime hater but after seeing the amazing art, really enjoying the first two chapters and seeing the devs are humans that care, I wanted to piece of whats going on here. I hope to be able to make some fan art when I have time as well

welcome! the community is relatively small especially the frequent chatters here in discord. The game can be kinda frustrating and hard at times so feel free to ask questions here, there is usually someone to answer questions here.

Small communities are awesome so that's fine with me. I am still very early into the game so I haven't struggled with anything yet but I'll be sure to ask if I do.

Yall i need help like what are good teams for D-zone

I’m not super great at D-Tide, but fundamentally you will want

1. a DPS
2. any BiS support that they can use that isn’t sought after by anuone else (Helot for Mouche, Lemurians for Gmurphy etc.)
3. enough keyflare across characters and wheels within the team to posse/rouse at least every 1/2 turns
4. some for of Vulnerable application
5. a good shielder/weakness applier that can get you alive to the finish line
Just ignore the extra turn gimmick and mindlessly spam annihilation for the extra insight
The free insight is honestly better than ultra turns
